===Pokémon Adventures===
[[File:Lt. Surge Sabrina Adventures.png|thumb|200px|Sabrina in Pokémon Adventures]]
====History====
====={{MangaArc|Red, Green & Blue}}=====
Sabrina is one of the three villainous heads of [[Team Rocket]], and serves under {{Adv|Giovanni}} in [[Pokémon Adventures]].

She debuts in ''[[PS020|Meanwhile...Vileplume!]]'', where she is seen floating atop her Kadabra and spots {{adv|Red}} leaving with an [[Vee|Eevee]] that Team Rocket experimented on. She comments how perfect it is that Eevee is in his hands and takes her leave elsewhere. Under Giovanni's orders, Sabrina captured {{p|Moltres}} and brought it to him at Saffron City. She attacks Red at Pallet Town, where she reveals that she has kidnapped {{adv|Professor Oak}} and taunts Red by telling him to come to Saffron City. Once they arrive, they find out that Sabrina's {{p|Mr. Mime}} closed off Saffron City with a barrier.

[[File:Sabrina Team Rocket Adventures.png|left|thumb|170px|Sabrina as a member of Team Rocket]]
Once Red, {{adv|Blue}}, and {{adv|Green}} manage to get past the barrier and inside the [[Silph Co.]] building, they are split up and face the three Rocket members alone. Sabrina is paired up against Green, who she forces to relive painful moments of her past by using her psychic abilities to pry into her mind and make her fears look real through illusions. Green eventually escapes the illusions by goading Sabrina into slashing her dress open, revealing two of her Pokémon hidden in her chest. Green's Pokémon use sound attacks to prevent Sabrina from using her powers and causing the illusions to fail. With Sabrina distracted, Green takes this chance to steal Sabrina's Marsh Badge and make her escape.

Sabrina eventually gets out of the attack and finds Red and Green with the Badge Energy Amplifier. Angered, she summons Moltres, Zapdos, and Articuno and has them surround Red. When Green activates the machine in order to obtain the new Pokémon she assumed it would create, she accidentally causes the three legendary Pokémon to fuse into one creature. Sabrina commands {{DL|legendary birds (Adventures)|Thu-Fi-Zer}} and uses it to attack the three with its great strength. Eventually, it is defeated when Red, Blue, and Green combine their attacks into one and manage to separate the three Pokémon back into their original forms.

====={{MangaArc|Yellow}}=====
[[File:Sabrina B2W2 chapter.png|thumb|170px|Sabrina in the {{MangaArc|Black 2 & White 2}}]]
Sabrina reappears with [[Koga]] and [[Lt. Surge]] to help battle the Elite Four on [[Cerise Island]]. There, they reveal that after their defeat at the Silph Co. building, they managed to escape and were planning on making a comeback before the Elite Four showed up. Although reluctant, the Rocket triad decides to work together with their former enemies to defeat their common opponents. Sabrina uses the [[Spoons of Destiny]] to decide with pair would face which member of the Elite Four. Sabrina is paired up with Green, and the two head off to face [[Lorelei]] in battle.

As soon as they arrive to face their opponent, Lorelei binds the two together with her ice handcuffs. Due to their lack of proper teamwork, the battle was only made harder with Sabrina and Green bound together. Eventually, Green defeats Lorelei after revealing the arm that was bound to Sabrina's arm was actually her [[Ditty]] in disguise and uses it to tie the villain up. This angers Sabrina, who soon yells at Green for fooling her just like she did to Lorelei. With the battle over, Sabrina leaves Green to meet up with Giovanni, who had also come to help battle. Although she and Lt. Surge suggest restarting Team Rocket again, Giovanni tells the two to go home and continue tending to their Gyms.

====={{MangaArc|Gold, Silver & Crystal}}=====
The battle with Lorelei gave Sabrina severe {{wp|frostbite}} injuries on her wrist. She managed to cure this by traveling to [[Mt. Silver]] and bathed in the hot springs found there. There, she encountered Red, who was there to cure his own frostbite injuries, and told him that something was going to happen at the Pokémon League. After leaving, Sabrina leaves Red a note telling him about another hot spring that can cure his frostbite much faster so that he can get to the Pokémon League quickly.

Afterwards, she travels to the Pokémon League to have an {{wp|exhibition game|exhibition match}} with the other Kanto Gym Leaders against the Johto Gym Leaders. Sabrina is paired up against [[Bugsy]], whose attempts to befriend her end in vain. Despite the type disadvantage, Sabrina manages to defeat Bugsy with her {{p|Mr. Mime}}, who uses its abilities to create invisible walls to its advantage. When the [[Masked Man]] attacks the Pokémon League with his army of mind controlled Team Rocket Grunts, Sabrina assists her fellow Gym Leaders by battling the army. Once the battle had finally ended, Sabrina went back to usual Gym Leader duties.

====={{MangaArc|Black 2 & White 2}}=====
Much later, she is revealed to have become an actress at [[Pokéstar Studios]]. When she notices {{adv|Whitley}} having trouble picking a movie to act in, Sabrina has her Alakazam use its abilities to pick out a [[Brycen-Man Series|Brycen-Man movie]] for her.

====Pokémon====
This is a listing of Sabrina's Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|pkmn=Drowzee
|type1=Psychic
|img=Sabrina Drowzee Adventures.png
|epnum=PS019
|epname=Blame It on Eevee
|desc={{p|Drowzee}} was used to sneak up on [[Erika]] prior to the showdown in [[Saffron City]]. However, it was noticed by the {{type|Grass}} Gym Leader and was easily defeated by Erika's {{p|Vileplume}}'s {{m|Petal Dance}}.

None of Drowzee's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|gender=male
|pkmn=Kadabra
|main=yes
|type1=Psychic
|img=Sabrina Kadabra Adventures.png
|epnum=PS020
|epname=Meanvile...Vileplume!
|desc={{p|Kadabra}} is Sabrina's mode of transportation and often carries her on his back. He was able to disguise himself as {{adv|Professor Oak}} and presumably other people as well. During Sabrina's battle with {{adv|Green}}, he is shown to be one of Sabrina's most powerful Pokémon with very strong moves.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|gender=female
|pkmn=Mr. Mime
|type1=Psychic
|img=Sabrina Mr Mime Adventures.png
|epnum=PS028
|epname=Peace of Mime
|desc={{p|Mr. Mime}} was used by Sabrina to keep a massive {{m|Light Screen}} around [[Saffron City]] in order to keep intruders out. She fell to {{adv|Red}} and {{adv|Blue}}'s teamwork in using [[Blue's Golduck]] to find her and Red's [[Pika]] to attack her. She was later used during the Gym Leader tournament, where she battled [[Bugsy's Scyther]] and defeated his {{p|Heracross}}.

Mr. Mime's known moves are {{m|Light Screen}}, {{m|Barrier}}, {{m|Confusion}}, {{m|Encore}}, and {{m|Psybeam}}, and her Ability is {{a|Filter}}.}}

{{anchor|Alakazam 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|gender=female
|pkmn=Alakazam
|type1=Psychic
|img=Sabrina Alakazam Adventures.png
|epnum=PS065
|epname=Karate Machop!
|desc={{p|Alakazam}} first appeared on [[Cerise Island]], where she was used to hand out the [[Spoons of Destiny]]. Later, she helped battle against Lorelei's {{type|Ice}} Pokémon. She also made an appearance in the {{MangaArc|Black 2 & White 2}}, where she helped choose a movie for {{adv|Whitley}}.

Alakazam's known moves are {{m|Kinesis}} and {{m|Psychic}}, and her Ability is {{a|Synchronize}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sabrina
|gender=female
|pkmn=Venomoth
|type1=Bug
|type2=Poison
|img=Sabrina Venomoth Adventures.png
|epnum=PS073
|epname=Valiant Venomoth!
|desc={{p|Venomoth}} was first used to battle [[Lorelei]] on Cerise Island. Due to Sabrina and Green's inability to work together, her moves were quickly blown away. Once Green was knocked unconscious, Sabrina was effectively able to knock out [[Lorelei's Cloyster]] with a repeated usage of Mega Drain. In the {{MangaArc|Gold, Silver & Crystal}}, Venomoth was seen at the Mt. Silver hot springs and later appeared with Sabrina at the Pokémon League.

Venomoth's known moves are {{m|Sleep Powder}} and {{m|Mega Drain}}.}}
